name: Regulation Monitor
description: Configure once, then on a schedule sweeps user-specified regulations across seed sources plus a reputable-domain web search, classifies each item, flags items relevant to the user's team using a light WorkIQ-derived profile, and renders a self-contained HTML dashboard. Domain-agnostic (tax, privacy, AI/ML, healthcare, finance, ESG, labor, etc.).
author: Jagmeet Chabra
